channel.title: Query Relevance on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Query Relevance on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Semantic reranker in Azure Cosmos DB
item.description:
Azure Cosmos DB now supports a public preview of semantic reranker, which reorders query or search results based on contextual relevance. It analyzes the meaning of both the query and data to improve result relevance.

  • Source: Azure Updates
